response: ANGEL HAS WRITTEN 80 LETTERS. MOST OF THE LETTERS ARE PUT INTO LARGE ENVELOPES. THE LARGE ENVELOPES EACH CONTAIN 2 LETTERS. THE REMAINING 20 LETTERS ARE PUT INTO SMALL ENVELOPES. THE LARGE ENVELOPES CONTAIN 2 LETTERS EACH. THE TOTAL NUMBER OF LARGE ENVELOPES IS CALCULATED BY DIVIDING THE TOTAL NUMBER OF LETTERS BY THE NUMBER OF LETTERS PER LARGE ENVELOPE. THE TOTAL NUMBER OF LETTERS IS 80. THE NUMBER OF LETTERS PER LARGE ENVELOPE IS 2. THE NUMBER OF LARGE ENVELOPES IS 80 DIVIDED BY 2. THE RESULT IS 40. THE LARGE ENVELOPES USED ARE 40.
